creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
The 25th anniversary badge first graced <https://www.freebsd.org/> on or around 22nd May 2018. I'm a tad squiffy from partying for the past three-and-a-half years. 

Please consider removing the badge before I foxtrot myself solo sideways into an early grave with a glass of Champagne. 

Thank you. 

Whilst still giddy from the long celebration, I might also ask someone at the Foundation to adjust <https://freebsdfoundation.org/national-freebsd-day/>. If I'm not mistaken, "Friday, July 18" last occurred in 2014 and we're invited to celebrate the 28th anniversary. I hope for this year's 29th anniversary party to last at least as long as the 25th. Cheers!
